zh.Old, Northamptonshire, England: 英國諾薩普頓史爾笛卡爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Yorke於1620年10月22日出生時，他的父親George W York24歲，母親Ellen Losbye25歲。他於1642年9月12日與Mary Jane Seymour在英國諾薩普頓史爾笛卡爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1660年9月25日之前在英國諾薩普頓史爾，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Yorke于1620年10月22日出生时，他的父亲George W York24岁，母亲Ellen Losbye25岁。他于1642年9月12日与Mary Jane Seymour在英国諾薩普頓史爾笛卡爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1660年9月25日之前在英国諾薩普頓史爾，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Yorke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: York
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of York in northern England. The surname is now widespread throughout England. Originally, the city bore the Latin name Eburacum, which is probably from a Brittonic name meaning ‘yew-tree place’. This was altered by folk etymology to Old English Eoforwīc (from the elements eofor ‘wild boar’ + wīc ‘specialized farmstead’). This name was taken over by Scandinavian settlers, who altered it back to opacity in the form Jórvík or Jórk (English York, which became finally settled as the placename in the 13th century). The surname has also been adopted by Jews as an Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of the East Slavic patronymic   Yurkovich   or its Croatian, Slovak, or Slovenian variants. Compare   Yurk  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Yorke was born on 22 October 1620, his father, George W York, was 24 and his mother, Ellen Losbye, was 25. He married Mary Jane Seymour on 12 September 1642, in Old, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 25 September 1660, in Northamptonshire, England, and was buried in Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Yorke est né le 22 octobre 1620, son père, George W York, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Ellen Losbye, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Mary Jane Seymour le 12 septembre 1642, à Old, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 25 septembre 1660, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Yorke am 22. Oktober 1620 geboren wurde, war sein Vater George W York 24 und seine Mutter Ellen Losbye 25. Er hat am 12. September 1642 in Old, Northamptonshire, England Mary Jane Seymour geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 25. September 1660 in Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Yorke è nato il il 22 ottobre 1620, il suo padre, George W York, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Ellen Losbye, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Mary Jane Seymour il 12 settembre 1642, nel Old, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 25 settembre 1660, nel Northamptonshire, England, e fu sepolto a Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Yorkeが1620年10月22日に生まれた時，父George W Yorkは24歳，母Ellen Losbyeは25歳であった。1642年9月12日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアオルドでMary Jane Seymourと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1660年9月25日以前にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Yorke(이)가 1620년 10월 22일에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George W York(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen Losbye(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1642년 9월 12일 영국 노르섬프토실르 드에서 Mary Jane Seymour(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1660년 9월 25일 이전 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르에 묻혔다.

pt.22 October 1620–before 25 September 1660: 22 de outubro de 1620–antes 25 de setembro de 1660
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Yorke nasceu em 22 de outubro de 1620, seu pai, George W York, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Losbye, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Jane Seymour em 12 de setembro de 1642, em Old, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 25 de setembro de 1660, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Yorke родился 22 октября 1620 г., его отцу по имени George W York было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Ellen Losbye, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Jane Seymour 12 сентября 1642 г. в местности олд, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 25 сентябрь 1660 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия и был похоронен в местности нортамптоншир, Англия.

Se casó con Mary Jane Seymour el 12 de septiembre de 1642, en Old, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de 25 de septiembre de 1660, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
